Bash(cd /home/erlkoenig/code/erlkoenig_ebpf/dsl && for f in examples/*.ex; do echo "=== $f ==="; mix run "$f" -e "mod = Module.concat\([String.to_atom\(Path.basename\(\\"$f\\", \\".ex\\"\) |> String.split\(\\"_\\"\) |> Enum.map\(&String.capitalize/1\) |> Enum.join\(\)\)]\); IO.inspect\(mod.compile\(\)\)" 2>&1 | tail -1; done)

Bash(elixir -e '
  Mix.install\([{:erlkoenig_ebpf_dsl, path: "."}]\)

  examples = [
    {HelloPass, "examples/01_hello_pass.ex"},
    {DropAll, "examples/02_drop_all.ex"},
    {IpBlacklist, "examples/03_ip_blacklist.ex"},
    {ProtocolCounter, "examples/04_protocol_counter.ex"},
    {PortFirewall, "examples/05_port_firewall.ex"},
    {SynFloodProtect, "examples/06_syn_flood_protect.ex"},
    {TtlFilter, "examples/07_ttl_filter.ex"},
    {BandwidthMonitor, "examples/08_bandwidth_monitor.ex"}
  ]

  for {mod, file} <- examples do
    Code.compile_file\(file\)
    case mod.compile\(\) do
      {:ok, bin} -> IO.puts\("#{file}: OK \(#{byte_size\(bin\)} bytes\)"\)
      {:error, err} -> IO.puts\("#{file}: FAIL #{inspect\(err\)}"\)
    end
  end
' 2>&1)

Bash(elixir -e '
  Mix.install\([{:erlkoenig_ebpf_dsl, path: "."}]\)
  for f <- Path.wildcard\("examples/*.ex"\) |> Enum.sort\(\) do
    [{mod, _}] = Code.compile_file\(f\)
    case mod.compile\(\) do
      {:ok, bin} -> IO.puts\("#{f}: OK \(#{byte_size\(bin\)} bytes\)"\)
      {:error, err} -> IO.puts\("#{f}: FAIL #{inspect\(err\)}"\)
    end
  end
' 2>&1)

Bash(cd /home/erlkoenig/code/erlkoenig_ebpf/dsl && elixir -e '
  Mix.install\([{:erlkoenig_ebpf_dsl, path: "."}]\)
  alias ErlkoenigEbpfDsl.Builder

  for proto <- [:ipv4, :tcp, :udp, :icmp] do
    state = Builder.new\("test_#{proto}"\)
    state = Builder.set_main_protocol\(state, proto, quote\(do: :pass\)\)
    ast = Builder.to_ast\(state\)
    case ErlkoenigEbpfDsl.compile\(ast\) do
      {:ok, bin} -> IO.puts\("on_#{proto}: #{byte_size\(bin\)} bytes, #{div\(byte_size\(bin\), 8\)} insns"\)
      {:error, err} -> IO.puts\("on_#{proto}: FAIL #{inspect\(err\)}"\)
    end
  end
' 2>&1 | grep "on_")

Bash(elixir -e '
Code.compile_file\("examples/18_ddos_blocklist.ex"\)
case DdosBlocklist.compile\(\) do
  {:ok, bin} -> IO.puts\("OK, #{byte_size\(bin\)} bytes"\)
  {:error, e} -> IO.puts\("ERROR: #{inspect\(e\)}"\)
end
')
